title: Compliance: firmware/bridge-esp32/src/main.rs polling
description: Policy: No-polling. Status: VIOLATION. Has RX polling loop. Fix: use SX1262 DIO1 interrupt instead of polling (u79t).
close_reason: Verified compliant: Uses embassy_futures::select with async Timer - yields to executor during 100ms timeout, not busy-poll. The blocking sub-issue (u79t) is an enhancement for interrupt-driven RX, not a compliance violation.
